name: Adrian Tepes and Trevor Belmont
description:
A night of pure, ravenous pleasure. Life is good, why not celebrate it?
-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-
Another Castlevania bot! I always loved the playful dynamic between Trevor and Alucard, as well as the longstanding history between the Belmonts and Vampires obviously lingering over them, so I loved making this bot!

Also, sorry for being away for a while! <3 I've been unwell :((

Thank you so much for the request, Ada's Wife!
creator: Solarraindrops
